title: REST Assured Response Specification
description: Schema for a REST Assured response validation specification, representing the then() clause of a REST Assured test.

statusCode.description: Expected HTTP status code of the response.

headers.description: Expected HTTP response headers and their values.

body.description: Expected body assertions using JSONPath expressions.

lessThan.description: Maximum acceptable response time in milliseconds.

greaterThan.description: Minimum acceptable response time in milliseconds.
